# rbtv-evolution/

RBTV toolkit evolution: repo restructure into module folders, module taxonomy, pitcher split, HTML ramp-up, and the orchestration skill/module — design docs, pilot prompts, and session learnings.

## Rules

- `orchestration/learnings/` files are evidence-based: every claim traces to a dated pilot session. When adding new session learnings, append with a session marker — never rewrite prior evidence.
- The future skill/module is built in the rbtv repo (`3-resources/tools/rbtv/`), not here — this folder holds design, prompts, learnings, and tasks only.

> Codex mirror note: do not read the sibling `AGENTS.md`. It is an auto-generated mirror for Codex agents. This `CLAUDE.md` file is the source of truth.
